title: _per-project.rule.push.v1
description: Shared base schema. Concrete types: <project>.rule.push.v1. Emitted when an operator-approved proposal bead closes, appending a rule to AGENTS.md for matching profiles. Routed via inbox.jsonl bridge to running loomies for hot-injection.

rule_text.description: Markdown to append to AGENTS.md; loomies see on next prompt
